content:
* NEWS
  * 27 March 2025

# AlphaFold is running out of data — so drug firms are building their own version

Thousands of 3D protein structures locked up in big-pharma vaults will be used to create a new AI tool that won’t be open to academics. 

By

  * Ewen Callaway

  1. Ewen Callaway

[View author publications](/search?author=Ewen+Callaway)

AlphaFold, the revolutionary, [Nobel-prizewinning tool](https://www.nature.com/articles/d41586-024-03214-7) for predicting protein structures, has a problem: it’s running low on data.
